# Google OKF Upstream Source

This directory vendors the GoogleCloudPlatform Knowledge Catalog OKF v0.1
specification for local reference.

- Upstream repository: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/knowledge-catalog
- Vendored spec path: `okf/SPEC.md`
- Upstream license path: `LICENSE.md`
- License: Apache-2.0
- Vendored on: 2026-06-15

The vendored spec is reference material. The executable compatibility contract
for this repository is enforced by `internal/*` tests, CLI smoke checks, and
`docs/okf-v0.1-compat.md`.
